title: Replace founder/co-founder profile photo with uploaded image

requirements.summary: Replace the existing founder profile photo placeholder with the newly generated professional headshot asset
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded person's photo appears in the founder/co-founder profile card image slot identified by the given XPath.
The image displays with the same shape and styling (e.g., rounded or circular) as the existing profile photo placeholder.
No other profile cards or page sections are affected.

file_operations.description: Locate the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[5]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] within the founders section and update its src attribute from the current placeholder to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-photo.dim_400x400.jpg'. Preserve all existing styling attributes including rounded/circular border-radius, dimensions, and any hover effects to maintain visual consistency with the current founder card design.
